COMMAND      PID    TID TASKCMD              USER   FD      TYPE             DEVICE  SIZE/OFF       NODE NAME
systemd        1                             root  cwd   unknown                                         /proc/1/cwd (readlink: Permission denied)

systemd        1                             root NOFD                                                   /proc/1/fd (opendir: Permission denied)
